steps.title: Keep the names essential
steps.content: The phrase after fashion designers identifies exactly which designers developed the method. Because the names are essential to the meaning, they should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Avoid breaking the subject
steps.content: Choice A inserts a comma between designers and the names, wrongly treating the names as extra information. Choice C places a comma after the names, separating the subject from developed. Choice D sets the names off with commas and creates both problems. The remaining choice keeps the essential identification unbroken. The answer is B.
